    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderTemplateField(DetailRecordProjection row, string columnPropertyName)
    {

        {
            return static _ => { };
        }

        {
            case "Id":

    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderTemplateDefaultField(DetailRecordProjection row, string columnPropertyName)
    {
        if (row is null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(columnPropertyName))
        {
            return static _ => { };
        }

        switch (columnPropertyName)
        {
            case "Id":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.Id.ToString());
                };
            case "LegalName":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.LegalName.ToString());
                };
            case "TaxId":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.TaxId.ToString());
                };
            case "ContactEmail":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.ContactEmail.ToString());
                };
            case "BillingAddress":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.BillingAddress.ToString());
                };
            case "OnboardedAt":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.OnboardedAt.ToString("d", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                };
            case "AccountManager":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.AccountManager.ToString());
                };
            case "LoyaltyTier":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.LoyaltyTier.ToString());
                };

                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.Seats.ToString("N0", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                };
            default:
                return static _ => { };
        }
    }

    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderTemplateRow(DetailRecordProjection row)

        {

    private bool HasProjectionSlot(string fieldName)
        => ProjectionSlotRegistry.Resolve(typeof(DetailRecordProjection), (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.DetailRecord, fieldName) is not null;

    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderSlotField<TField>(
        DetailRecordProjection row,
        string fieldName,
        string displayName,
        string? format,
        int? order,
        bool isFieldReadOnly,
        string? description,
        TField? value,
        global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.FieldSlotContext<DetailRecordProjection, TField>> renderDefault)
    {
        return builder =>
        {
            var __renderContext = RenderContext ?? new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.RenderContext(
                TenantId: string.Empty,
                UserId: string.Empty,
                Mode: global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.FcRenderMode.Server,
                DensityLevel: global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.DensityLevel.Comfortable,
                IsReadOnly: false);
            var __field = new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.FieldDescriptor(
                Name: fieldName,
                TypeName: typeof(TField).FullName ?? typeof(TField).Name,
                IsNullable: System.Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(TField)) is not null || !typeof(TField).IsValueType,
                DisplayName: displayName,
                Format: format,
                Order: order,
                IsReadOnly: isFieldReadOnly,
                Hints: null,
                Description: description);
            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcFieldSlotHost<DetailRecordProjection, TField>>(0);
            builder.AddAttribute(1, "Parent", row);
            builder.AddAttribute(2, "Value", value);
            builder.AddAttribute(3, "Field", __field);
            builder.AddAttribute(4, "RenderContext", __renderContext);
            builder.AddAttribute(5, "ProjectionRole", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.DetailRecord);
            builder.AddAttribute(6, "RenderDefault", renderDefault);
            builder.CloseComponent();
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        DetailRecordProjectionState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
    }

    private void OnStateChanged(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        => InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void Dispose()
    {
        DetailRecordProjectionState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
    }

    private static string Truncate(string value, int maxLength)
        => value.Length <= maxLength ? value : value.Substring(0, maxLength - 1) + "\u2026";

    private static string HumanizeEnumLabel(string value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
        {
            return value;
        }

        var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder(value.Length + 10);

        for (int i = 0; i < value.Length; i++)
        {
            char c = value[i];

            if (i == 0)
            {
                sb.Append(char.ToUpperInvariant(c));
                continue;
            }

            bool isUpper = c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z';
            bool prevIsUpper = value[i - 1] >= 'A' && value[i - 1] <= 'Z';
            bool prevIsLower = value[i - 1] >= 'a' && value[i - 1] <= 'z';
            bool prevIsDigit = value[i - 1] >= '0' && value[i - 1] <= '9';

            if (isUpper && prevIsLower)
            {
                sb.Append(' ');
                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else if (isUpper && prevIsUpper && i + 1 < value.Length)
            {
                char next = value[i + 1];
                bool nextIsLower = next >= 'a' && next <= 'z';
                if (nextIsLower && CountConsecutiveUppersBefore(value, i) + 1 >= 3)
                {
                    sb.Append(' ');
                }

                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else if (isUpper && prevIsDigit)
            {
                sb.Append(' ');
                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else
            {
                sb.Append(c);
            }
        }

        return sb.ToString();
    }

    private static int CountConsecutiveUppersBefore(string value, int index)
    {
        int count = 0;
        for (int i = index - 1; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            if (value[i] >= 'A' && value[i] <= 'Z')
            {
                count++;
            }
            else
            {
                break;
            }
        }

        return count;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void BuildRenderTree(RenderTreeBuilder builder)
    {
        var state = DetailRecordProjectionState.Value;
        int seq = 0;

        builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionSubtitle>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ProjectionType", typeof(DetailRecordProjection));
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Role", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.DetailRecord);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "WhenState", (string?)null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "FallbackCount", state.Items?.Count ?? 0);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "DistinctStatusCount", (int?)null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityLabel", "Detail Record");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityPluralLabel", "detail records");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "IsLoading", state.IsLoading);
        builder.CloseComponent();

        if (state.IsLoading)
        {
            builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionLoadingSkeleton>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ColumnCount", 8);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "RowCount", 5);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Layout", Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.SkeletonLayout.Card);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityLabel", "detail records");
            builder.CloseComponent();
            return;
        }

        if (state.Items is null || state.Items.Count == 0)
        {
            builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionEmptyPlaceholder>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ProjectionType", typeof(DetailRecordProjection));
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Role", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.DetailRecord);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityPluralOverride", "detail records");
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "CtaCommandName", (string?)null);
            builder.CloseComponent();
            return;
        }

        seq = 100;
        global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment defaultBody = (global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Rendering.RenderTreeBuilder __bb) =>
        {
            var builder = __bb;
            int seq = 100;
        var entity = state.Items[0];

        builder.OpenComponent<FluentCard>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder b) =>
        {
            int fieldSeq = 400;

            b.OpenElement(fieldSeq++, "div");
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
            b.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
            {
                labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Id");
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            if (HasProjectionSlot("Id"))
            {
                RenderSlotField(entity,
                    fieldName: "Id",
                    displayName: "Id",

                    isFieldReadOnly: false,

                    value: entity.Id,

                {

                    {
                        textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.BillingAddress);
                    }));
                    slotBuilder.CloseComponent();
                })(b);
            }
            else
            {
                b.OpenComponent<FluentText>(fieldSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                {
                    textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.BillingAddress);
                }));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }
            b.CloseElement();
            b.OpenElement(fieldSeq++, "div");
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
            b.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
            {
                labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Onboarded At");
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            if (HasProjectionSlot("OnboardedAt"))
            {
                RenderSlotField(entity,
                    fieldName: "OnboardedAt",
                    displayName: "Onboarded At",
                    format: "d",
                    order: (int?)null,
                    isFieldReadOnly: false,
                    description: (string?)null,
                    value: entity.OnboardedAt,
                    renderDefault: __ctx => (RenderTreeBuilder slotBuilder) =>
                {
                    int slotSeq = 0;
                    slotBuilder.OpenComponent<FluentText>(slotSeq++);
                    slotBuilder.AddAttribute(slotSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                    {
                        textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.OnboardedAt.ToString("d", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                    }));
                    slotBuilder.CloseComponent();
                })(b);
            }
            else
            {
                b.OpenComponent<FluentText>(fieldSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                {
                    textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.OnboardedAt.ToString("d", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                }));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }
            b.CloseElement();
        }));
        builder.CloseComponent();

        builder.OpenComponent<FluentAccordion>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder b) =>
        {
            b.OpenComponent<FluentAccordionItem>(500);
            b.AddAttribute(501, "Expanded", false);
            b.AddAttribute(502, "HeadingLevel", 3);
            b.AddAttribute(503, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder ib) =>
            {
                int secFieldSeq = 600;
                ib.OpenElement(secFieldSeq++, "div");
                ib.AddAttribute(secFieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
                ib.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(secFieldSeq++);
                ib.AddAttribute(secFieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
                {
                    labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Account Manager");
                }));
                ib.CloseComponent();
                if (HasProjectionSlot("AccountManager"))
                {
                    RenderSlotField(entity,
                        fieldName: "AccountManager",
                        displayName: "Account Manager",
                        format: (string?)null,
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: entity.AccountManager,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => (RenderTreeBuilder slotBuilder) =>
                    {
                        int slotSeq = 0;
                        slotBuilder.OpenComponent<FluentText>(slotSeq++);
                        slotBuilder.AddAttribute(slotSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                        {
                            textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.AccountManager);
                        }));
                        slotBuilder.CloseComponent();
                    })(ib);
                }
                else
                {
                    ib.OpenComponent<FluentText>(secFieldSeq++);
                    ib.AddAttribute(secFieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                    {
                        textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.AccountManager);
                    }));
                    ib.CloseComponent();
                }
                ib.CloseElement();
                ib.OpenElement(secFieldSeq++, "div");
                ib.AddAttribute(secFieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
                ib.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(secFieldSeq++);
                ib.AddAttribute(secFieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
                {
                    labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Loyalty Tier");
                }));
                ib.CloseComponent();
                if (HasProjectionSlot("LoyaltyTier"))
                {
                    RenderSlotField(entity,
                        fieldName: "LoyaltyTier",
                        displayName: "Loyalty Tier",
                        format: (string?)null,
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: entity.LoyaltyTier,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => (RenderTreeBuilder slotBuilder) =>
                    {
                        int slotSeq = 0;
                        slotBuilder.OpenComponent<FluentText>(slotSeq++);
                        slotBuilder.AddAttribute(slotSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                        {
                            textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.LoyaltyTier);
                        }));
                        slotBuilder.CloseComponent();
                    })(ib);
                }
                else
                {
                    ib.OpenComponent<FluentText>(secFieldSeq++);
                    ib.AddAttribute(secFieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                    {
                        textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.LoyaltyTier);
                    }));
                    ib.CloseComponent();
                }
                ib.CloseElement();
                ib.OpenElement(secFieldSeq++, "div");
                ib.AddAttribute(secFieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
                ib.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(secFieldSeq++);
                ib.AddAttribute(secFieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
                {
                    labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Seats");
                }));
                ib.CloseComponent();
                if (HasProjectionSlot("Seats"))
                {
                    RenderSlotField(entity,
                        fieldName: "Seats",
                        displayName: "Seats",
                        format: "N0",
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: entity.Seats,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => (RenderTreeBuilder slotBuilder) =>
                    {
                        int slotSeq = 0;
                        slotBuilder.OpenComponent<FluentText>(slotSeq++);
                        slotBuilder.AddAttribute(slotSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                        {
                            textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.Seats.ToString("N0", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                        }));
                        slotBuilder.CloseComponent();
                    })(ib);
                }
                else
                {
                    ib.OpenComponent<FluentText>(secFieldSeq++);
                    ib.AddAttribute(secFieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                    {
                        textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.Seats.ToString("N0", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                    }));
                    ib.CloseComponent();
                }
                ib.CloseElement();
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
        }));
        builder.CloseComponent();
        };

        var __templateDescriptor = ProjectionTemplateRegistry.Resolve(typeof(DetailRecordProjection), (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.DetailRecord);
        if (__templateDescriptor is not null)
        {
            var __templateContext = new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ProjectionTemplateContext<DetailRecordProjection>(
                projectionType: typeof(DetailRecordProjection),
                boundedContext: "Customers",
                role: (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.DetailRecord,
                renderContext: RenderContext,
                items: state.Items ?? (System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<DetailRecordProjection>)System.Array.Empty<DetailRecordProjection>(),
                columns: _templateColumnsDescriptor,
                sections: _templateSectionsDescriptor,
                defaultBody: defaultBody,
                sectionRenderer: sectionName => string.Equals(sectionName, "Body", System.StringComparison.Ordinal) ? defaultBody : static _ => { },
                rowRenderer: RenderTemplateRow,
                fieldRenderer: RenderTemplateField);

            builder.OpenComponent(seq++, __templateDescriptor.TemplateType);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Context", __templateContext);
            builder.CloseComponent();
        }
        else
        {
            defaultBody(builder);
        }
    }
}

=== Diagnostics (HFC*** only) ===
(none)
